results.title: Pep Guardiola to leave Man City at the end of the season - reports
results.description: Pep Guardiola is set to bring his trophy-laden decade in charge of Manchester City to an end this weekend.

results.title: Spurs-Thunder matchup lives up to the hype, and Victor Wembanyama goes completely beyond it
results.description: The epic heavyweight title bout delivered with the Spurs superstar landing the knockout blow in Game 1 of the Western Conference finals.

results.title: This has to be one of the defining knocks of Ishan Kishan’s IPL career, says Sanjay Bangar
results.description: New Delhi, May 19 (SocialNews.XYZ) Former India batting coach Sanjay Bangar hailed Ishan Kishan’s calmness and maturity after the wicketkeeper-batter guided Sunrisers Hyderabad to a crucial five-wicket victory over Chennai Super Kings and into the... The post This has to be one of the defining knocks of Ishan Kishan’s IPL career, says Sanjay Bangar appeared first on Social News XYZ .

results.title: Ronaldo, Messi, Neymar top list of footballers with most social media influence in 2026
results.description: Cristiano Ronaldo, Lionel Messi and Neymar da Silva Santos are among the world's top 10 footballers with the largest social media followings. The post Ronaldo, Messi, Neymar top list of footballers with most social media influence in 2026 appeared first on The Sun Nigeria .
